item.title: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.
item.description: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.

item.title: 👍Andi Smith - Ballmer Group
item.description: Andi Smith signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Ballmer Group.

item.description: Mary Sprute Garlant signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of Governor Ferguson.

item.description: Tana Senn signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Department of Children, Youth and Families.

item.title: 👍💵Melissa Johnson - Washington State Association of Head Start & ECEAP
item.description: Melissa Johnson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association of Head Start & ECEAP. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Karen Matson - Snohomish County Human Services
item.description: Karen Matson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Snohomish County Human Services.

item.title: 👍💵Erin Haick - SEIU 925
item.description: Erin Haick signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent SEIU 925. They are a registered lobbyist.
